meta.title: Amanak — Your Medical Journey in Egypt
meta.description: Trusted healthcare in Egypt’s leading hospitals for our patients from the Middle East. A safe medical journey with clear costs.

h1.description: Multi-specialty center with modern ORs and dedicated international patient services.

h2.description: Focused orthopedics and oncology programs with an international consultant team.

h3.description: Full IVF pathways and nursing staff fluent in several languages.

treatments.pageLead: Explore the pathways we coordinate in Egypt.. from the first review to travel and follow-up.

diabetic_foot.title: Diabetic Foot Care.. Limb Salvage
diabetic_foot.description: We use modern techniques for limb salvage and preventing amputation with success rates up to 98%.
diabetic_foot.doctors: Prof. Rashad Bishara, Prof. Ayman El Samadony, Dr. Hussein Alwan
diabetic_foot.hospitals: Egyptian Center for Diabetic Foot, Andalusia Hospitals
diabetic_foot.techniques: Peripheral Angioplasty, Vacuum Therapy (NPWT), Hyperbaric Oxygen (HBOT)
diabetic_foot.body:
Complex diabetic foot cases require immediate and comprehensive medical evaluation, including blood flow, infection control, and a precise wound care plan to avoid complications that may threaten the limb.

In Egypt, medical teams have extensive experience in dealing with joint disease and deep infection cases, using the latest imaging and revascularization techniques.

We help you share your medical records early and align on a realistic treatment plan, with clarification on stay duration, aftercare details, and follow-up with your doctor after return.

ivf.title: IVF & Fertility
ivf.description: Integrated programs to achieve the dream of motherhood with success rates matching the best global centers.
ivf.doctors: Prof. Mohamed Aboulghar, Dr. Sherif Pasha Seif, Dr. Ismail Aboul Fotouh
ivf.hospitals: Bedaya Hospital, Sunrise Fertility Center, Egyptian IVF Center
ivf.techniques: No-Needle IVF, Genetic Screening (PGD/PGT), Gender Selection
ivf.body:
The success of IVF depends on precise medical protocols, reliable lab quality, and transparent planning for each stage, away from general marketing promises.

Egypt has long-standing experience in treating fertility diseases, where a customized treatment program is designed for each case based on age, ovarian reserve, and the couple's medical history.

We coordinate remote medical record review and clarify all details of the treatment stages, with full logistical support so you can focus on your medical journey calmly.

oncology.title: Oncology (Cancer Treatment)
oncology.description: Modern treatment protocols according to international standards (ESMO) with the latest immunotherapy and genetic treatments.
oncology.body:
Cancer patient care requires precise coordination between diagnosis, evaluation, and medical, radiation, and surgical treatments, relying on the most accurate analysis and imaging.

Medical centers in Egypt adopt the Tumor Boards system to ensure the best treatment plan for each patient according to international guidelines.

Amanak team focuses on preparing your medical file for consultation and providing a second medical opinion when needed, with travel plan organization that respects treatment dates and recovery periods.

joint_replacement.title: Hip Replacement Surgery
joint_replacement.description: Involves replacing the damaged hip joint with a prosthetic one to help patients walk comfortably and pain-free.
joint_replacement.hospitals: Saudi German Hospital, Andalusia Hospitals, October 6 University
joint_replacement.body:
Joint replacement results depend on the surgeon's skill, the quality of joints used, and intensive physical therapy programs to ensure the best movement and fastest recovery.

Joint surgeons in Egypt regularly perform complex operations, following modern protocols that ensure the patient returns to their normal life in record time.

We help you evaluate your case before travel and determine the required stay duration and physical therapy sessions, to ensure a successful and comfortable medical journey.

knee_replacement.title: Knee Replacement Surgery
knee_replacement.description: The damaged knee joint is replaced with an artificial implant to relieve pain and restore mobility.
knee_replacement.body: Ideal for patients with severe joint damage or advanced arthritis. Modern implants and minimally invasive techniques ensure a faster return to daily activities.

limb_lengthening.title: Limb Lengthening Surgery
limb_lengthening.description: A procedure designed to increase leg length by gradually stretching the bones.
limb_lengthening.body: Performed for medical reasons (such as correcting leg length discrepancies) or for cosmetic purposes to safely increase height using internal or external fixation devices.

spine_surgery.title: Spine Surgeries
spine_surgery.description: Includes procedures like spinal fusion, herniated disc removal, and scoliosis correction.
spine_surgery.body: These surgeries relieve chronic back pain and improve spinal function using the latest surgical navigation and monitoring systems.

breast_augmentation.title: Breast Augmentation
breast_augmentation.description: This procedure enhances breast size and shape using either silicone implants or fat transfer.
breast_augmentation.body: Silicone Implants: Offer a long-lasting, natural, and attractive look. Fat Transfer: Fat is harvested from areas like the abdomen or thighs, purified, and then injected into the breasts to achieve a fuller and natural appearance.

bbl.title: Brazilian Butt Lift (BBL)
bbl.description: A cosmetic procedure that enhances the shape and volume of the buttocks by injecting fat taken from other body areas.
bbl.body: Advanced VASER liposuction is used to safely extract fat while minimizing bruising and swelling, achieving natural and defined results.

gynecomastia.title: Gynecomastia Surgery
gynecomastia.description: This surgery treats enlarged male breasts using a combination of liposuction, gland removal, and skin removal.
gynecomastia.body: VASER technology may be used for more precise results and chest contouring. This surgery treats enlarged male breasts using a combination of liposuction, gland removal, and, in severe cases, excess skin removal.

vaser_liposuction.title: VASER Liposuction Technology
vaser_liposuction.description: Advanced liposuction technique using ultrasound waves to break down fat before removal.
vaser_liposuction.body: This advanced liposuction technique uses ultrasound waves to break down fat before removal, making the procedure less invasive. It helps reduce swelling and bruising compared to traditional methods. The procedure depends on the patient's condition and targeted areas. It is considered safe and effective for achieving natural and outstanding results.

addiction.title: Addiction Treatment.. Private & Confidential
addiction.description: Integrated rehabilitation programs in a calm environment providing maximum comfort and confidentiality.
addiction.body:
Effective addiction treatment combines precise medical assessment and evidence-based behavioral therapy, with a continuous follow-up plan after return.

We place the highest importance on privacy and psychological comfort for the patient and their family, with clarification of all treatment program details and communication channels from the start.

Amanak team ensures respectful coordination that considers total confidentiality and comfortable logistics, for a safe and successful change journey.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic & Body Contouring
cosmetic.description: The latest body contouring (VASER) and advanced hair transplantation techniques.
cosmetic.doctors: Dr. Adel Wilson, Dr. Ashraf Aboul Fotouh, Dr. Yasser Badi
cosmetic.hospitals: Specialized Aesthetic Centers in Cairo & Alexandria
cosmetic.body:
Aesthetic surgery requires precise case evaluation and realistic planning for results and recovery period, to ensure obtaining the desired appearance with total safety.

Specialists in Egypt are characterized by high skill in rhinoplasty, body contouring, and facial rejuvenation operations, using the latest global technologies.

We support you in arranging medical consultations, clarifying required tests, and coordinating travel dates to suit the treatment and follow-up plan.

hero.title: Reclaim your wellbeing in Egypt with integrated care.
hero.subtitle: From Libya, Iraq, and across the region to Egypt’s leading hospitals. Amanak holds hospitals, specialists, accommodation, and transport under one accountable team—so recovery stays safe and your budget is clear before you travel.
hero.imageAlt: Aerial view of the Nile River and Cairo skyline

whyEgypt.title: Why choose Egypt.. and why Amanak?
whyEgypt.lead: Egypt combines deep medical expertise with real value. Amanak is your partner managing the entire journey: accredited hospitals, trusted doctors, comfortable stays, and safe transport—all with costs defined in advance.
whyEgypt.bullet1: Elite surgeons and consultants in modern hospitals achieving world-class results, at carefully planned costs that suit families in our region.
whyEgypt.bullet2Title: The Amanak Team by Your Side
whyEgypt.bullet2: We are a licensed Egyptian company and a member of the Travel Agents Association (ETAA). Our team accompanies you every step of the way, from record review to your safe return.
whyEgypt.bullet3: We handle scheduling, physician selection, and arranging accommodation and transfers. Having one accountable partner ensures the highest standards of care.
whyEgypt.bullet4: Treatment, stay, and transport costs are determined upfront. You receive a clear plan before traveling, so you can make your family decision with confidence.

accreditedHospitals.title: Internationally Accredited Care in Egypt
accreditedHospitals.lead: We partner with hospitals that meet rigorous global and national standards, ensuring your safety and the highest quality of medical service.
accreditedHospitals.gaharBody: The General Authority for Healthcare Accreditation and Regulation (GAHAR) is Egypt's official body. Its standards are ISQua-accredited, matching the highest global benchmarks for patient safety and clinical excellence.
accreditedHospitals.jciBody: Joint Commission International (JCI) is the world's leader in healthcare accreditation. JCI-accredited hospitals in Egypt demonstrate a commitment to the same safety standards found in the top medical centers in the US and Europe.
accreditedHospitals.tableCaption: A selection of our accredited hospital partners

accommodation.sealTitle: Licensed Partner.. Care Backed by Tourism Expertise
accommodation.sealBody: Amanak is an official member of the Egyptian Travel Agents Association (ETAA). We operate as a certified travel operator to ensure you have a comfortable stay and organized logistics, from your arrival until your safe departure.
accommodation.verifyLinkText: Verify membership on the official portal
accommodation.staysTitle: Accommodation Focused on Your Comfort and Recovery
accommodation.staysLead: We understand that our patients from the region prefer traveling with their families, so we prioritize providing accommodation options that suit companions and offer an atmosphere for healing and family support, at preferential rates for Amanak patients.
accommodation.staysProximity: Premium residential options just minutes from major hospitals, ensuring easy transport and patient comfort.
accommodation.staysRates: Exclusive agreements with hotels and serviced apartments to provide suitable rates for long stays.
accommodation.staysCulture: We select places that offer halal dining options, prayer facilities, and equipped kitchens to make you feel at home.

listing1.title: Fairmont Nile City - Cairo
listing1.features: Luxury Suite • Nile View • Near Major Medical Centers

listing2.title: Modern Suite - Heliopolis
listing2.features: 2 Bedrooms • Near Cleopatra Hospital • Family Friendly

listing3.title: Premium Stay - 6th of October
listing3.features: 3 Bedrooms • Near Dar Al Fouad • Quiet Environment

transportation.title: Our transportation partners: safety and comfort in every mile
transportation.intro: We partner with Egypt’s leading licensed transport providers so your journey is as smooth as your recovery. For ultimate quiet and monitored safety, we work with JTNY and its fully electric, Ministry-licensed fleet. For reliable, transparent city travel, we use Arrw—Egypt’s licensed ride-hailing platform with verified drivers and real-time tracking. Combined with private VIP airport reception and medical-safe vehicles, you never have to worry about how to get where you are going.
transportation.jtnyTagline: Premium, silent recovery on the road
transportation.jtnyWhat: Egypt’s first officially licensed electric ride-hailing app: a luxury fleet of 100 fully electric vehicles licensed by the Ministry of Transport—ideal when calm matters right after a procedure.
transportation.jtnyB1: Silent transport: no engine noise or vibration—easier on patients traveling soon after surgery or those sensitive to sound during recovery.
transportation.jtnyB2: In-cabin cameras cover the full trip—reassuring for families in Iraq and Libya following a loved one in an unfamiliar city.
transportation.jtnyB3: Handpicked drivers trained to demanding service standards—not anonymous street hail.
transportation.jtnyB4: Intercity luxury service between Cairo and Alexandria in new, safety-focused vehicles when your care plan spans both cities.
transportation.jtnyImageAlt: Calm, modern vehicle suggesting quiet electric transport
transportation.arrwWhat: A locally developed, licensed Egyptian ride-hailing platform built for the domestic market—with security, fair upfront pricing, and reliability for international patients.
transportation.arrwB1: Competitive, upfront rates with no hidden fees—critical when you are managing a strict medical budget abroad.
transportation.arrwB2: Vetted drivers, live trip tracking, and optional dashcam service for added security during the ride.
transportation.arrwB3: Pay with cash, card, or in-app wallet—flexible when you are still settling local payment options.
transportation.privateLead: Licensed apps cover day-to-day movement; our private partners handle clinical-grade needs and border-to-bed hand-offs.
transportation.privateAirport: Especially valuable for Iraqi travelers: representatives can meet patients before passport control to assist with security approvals and entry formalities—so the first hour in Egypt feels guided, not chaotic.
transportation.privateVehicle: Post-operative transfers use vehicles with extra legroom and reclining seats when needed—to your hotel or onward routing such as the Salloum border when your care plan requires it.
transportation.private247: Dedicated drivers for hospital visits, pharmacy runs, labs, and imaging—door-to-door, on your schedule, not a generic tour clock.
transportation.privateClosing: Apps plus private partners mean every leg—from curbside to clinic—is chosen for safety, transparency, and the comfort your case demands.
transportation.privateImageAltMeet: Premium chauffeur fleet of luxury sedans for private transportation
transportation.privateImageAltVehicle: Spacious and comfortable vehicle for patient transfer
transportation.privateImageCaption: We choose the right vehicle for your health condition, ensuring your total comfort between the hotel and the hospital.

topDoctorsReels.title: Leading doctors in Egypt
topDoctorsReels.lead: Egypt is home to surgeons and consultants who routinely manage complex cases with outcomes that compare well across the region. Scroll these Instagram highlights.. patient stories and clinical excellence at centres we trust for your Amanak journey.

painPoints.title: Goodbye to medical travel headaches.. A smooth journey with Amanak
painPoints.row1s: Defined packages covering everything, from airport to hospital.
painPoints.row2s: We coordinate your appointments with hospitals and labs before you arrive, so you can start treatment immediately.
painPoints.row3p: Concerns about service quality or reliability
painPoints.row3s: We are your official and legal partner in Egypt, ensuring your rights and the highest standards of quality.
painPoints.row4s: We provide comfortable accommodation and a dedicated private transport throughout your stay.

process.title: Your journey with us in 4 simple steps:
process.step1: Upload your medical records in a secure environment that ensures your privacy.
process.step2: Our medical team carefully reviews your case and presents it to the specialist physician.
process.step3: Select from our diverse packages (Economy, VIP, Integrated) to suit your needs.
process.step4: We receive you from the airport and begin the healing journey with continuous follow-up at every step.

trust.stats: More than 500 patients from the region have trusted us with their medical journey.

1.quote: "I was worried about the arrangements for treatment in Egypt, but with Amanak, every detail was clear and costs were defined before my travel."

2.quote: "The medical team in Egypt is world-class. Amanak coordinated everything from my arrival to the final check-up. I felt at home."

3.quote: "Professionalism and transparency are what define Amanak. The diabetic foot care I received saved my limb when others said it was impossible."

finalCta.title: Don’t leave health to chance.
finalCta.body: Register and upload your records; your Amanak medical advisor will reach out within 24 hours to finalize details.
